executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Two external-owned blockers prevent whole-stack green: marketing independent verification fail (68+h stale) and blocked-channel-recovery timeout (698 consecutive, critical escalation). Architecture-owned gates are green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout (698 consecutive, critical escalation level) — highest-volume recurring failure, consuming scheduler capacity.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery: 698 consecutive timeouts, critical escalation
findings.mechanism: Job times out on external channel probing; escalation at critical level.
findings.root_cause: External channel unreachable or recovery path exhausted.
findings.recommended_fix: External domain: requires channel-side unblock or recovery-path redesign.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification fail, 68h stale
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification returns fail; last check May 28, no fresh measurable outcome evidence.
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption evidence missing; marketing loop has not produced a pass since last cycle.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce measurable outcome evidence and rerun independent verification to clear the blocker.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verifier and independent verification both green
findings.mechanism: Verifier returns ok with zero architecture errors; independent verification returns qualified_pass.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain fresh independent verification tied to live runtime evidence on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology clean: 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 lastError
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms full coherence — no disabled or error-bearing jobs in the cron table itself.
findings.root_cause: Topology stable; no drift from persisted history.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue direct cron inspection as source of truth on each run.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Resolve blocked-channel-recovery timeout loop (698 consecutive failures, critical escalation)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Dominant recurring failure; consumes scheduler capacity and masks other issues in health monitor.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Eliminates the primary noise source; allows health monitor to surface only real issues.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification; artifact is 68 hours stale.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed ownership.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Verifier rerun → ok, zero architecture errors, independent artifact current.
Independent verify rerun → qualified_pass, 2 external blockers noted (marketing fail, blocked-channel-recovery timeout).
Both remaining blockers confirmed as external-owned: marketing fail (68h stale), blocked-channel-recovery timeout (698 repeats). Architecture gates green.
Live cron list shows 26/26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 lastError — topology matches persisted audit state.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.
external_blockers: marketing independent verification fail, 68h stale (last pass: never in current cycle)

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery: 698 consecutive timeouts at critical escalation
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Dominant recurring failure; consumes scheduler capacity and masks other issues in health monitor.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned verifier path is coherent and independently verified; does not mean whole stack green.
Live Gateway topology: 26 jobs, 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 lastError — fully coherent.
Two external blockers: blocked-channel-recovery timeout (698 repeats, critical) and marketing independent verification stale (68h, fail).
No live repair needed this watchdog run — architecture-side checks all pass.
Health monitor correctly flags both external issues; no false positives detected.
